SDK-independent MK_rhi_vulkan/MK_rhi_metal backend scaffold targets, plus NullRhiDevice contract with resources, samplers, swapchains, explicit swapchain frame acquire/release, backend-neutral swapchain resize, shaders, descriptor set layouts, descriptor sets, upload-buffer writes, copy/upload/readback commands with explicit texture footprints, CPU buffer readback, transient resource leases, presentation ownership and sequencing, single-pending-frame swapchain throttling, graphics pipelines with vertex input layouts/attributes plus DepthStencilStateDesc depth-test/write/compare state, render passes with explicit clear colors plus optional RenderPassDepthAttachment and ClearDepthValue, vertex/index buffer binding, direct/indexed draw calls, command lists, resource transitions, fence semantics, and backend-neutral write/copy/read/fence/sampler stats, GPU debug-scope/marker stats, D3D12 graphics-queue timestamp frequency reporting, and read-only memory_diagnostics snapshots. RHI Depth Attachment Contract v0 is backend-neutral and NullRHI-validated; Depth Sampling Contract v0 allows depth24_stencil8 textures to use depth_stencil|shader_resource with explicit depth_write-to-shader_read transitions while keeping native views private; D3D12 now implements private DSV-backed depth attachments, sampled depth textures through typeless DSV/SRV views, native depth pipeline state, active pass/pipeline color-depth validation, readback-observable depth-test proof, sampled-depth readback proof, depth-aware postprocess readback proof, and directional shadow receiver readback proof plus fixed sampled-depth 3x3 PCF boundary readback proof through the public RHI contract; Vulkan now implements private depth-aspect image views, D24S8 depth|stencil barrier aspect masks, required synchronization2 feature query/device enablement, depth+sampled create planning, sampled-depth descriptor update coverage, depth_write synchronization2 barriers, depth_write-to-shader_read shader-read barriers, dynamic-rendering depth attachments, native depth pipeline state, active pass/pipeline color-depth validation, texture-state compatibility checks, environment-gated depth-ordered readback proof, environment-gated visible sampled-depth readback proof, environment-gated postprocess-depth readback proof, and environment-gated shadow receiver readback proof through the same public RHI contract; Metal native depth recording/sampling, Metal postprocess depth, Metal shadow presentation, broader postprocess effects, and production shadow-map quality remain follow-up work

ownership, graphics PSO ownership/binding with optional input layouts and native depth-stencil state, swapchain and texture render-target setup, private depth-stencil view setup, upload-buffer writes, state validation before render/copy/transition commands, stale cross-queue texture-state submission rejection, descriptor/root-signature/PSO validation failure proof, non-black render-target clear readback proof, renderer viewport clear-color readback proof, first-triangle texture readback proof, depth-tested overlapping-triangle texture readback proof, shared texture export proof, swapchain present sequencing proof, swapchain resize proof, explicit swapchain frame acquire/release proof, single-pending-frame throttling proof, backend-neutral fence lifecycle stats, shared texture Native ID3D12Object::SetName labels are applied to the device, graphics/compute/copy queues, submission fence, committed buffers and textures, swapchain back buffers and swapchain RTV descriptor heaps, CBV/SRV/UAV and sampler descriptor heaps, root signatures, graphics pipeline states, per-command-list allocators and command lists, and bootstrap proof upload/readback/default resources for PIX and GPU-based validation object listings. Native D3D12 sampler descriptors are implemented with a separate shader-visible sampler arena, root-signature table splitting by heap kind, descriptor-set binding across CBV/SRV/UAV plus sampler root tables, a visible sampled-texture-plus-sampler readback proof, a D3D12-visible RhiFrameRenderer runtime material texture-sampling proof, a D3D12-visible uploaded runtime mesh vertex/index buffer readback proof, a D3D12-visible cooked runtime scene GPU palette indexed draw/readback proof, and an installed SDL3 sample_desktop_runtime_game proof that renders a packaged cooked scene through host-owned D3D12 scene GPU binding injection using target-specific scene DXIL artifacts. Installed SDL3 D3D12 package-visible postprocess depth and fixed sampled-depth 3x3 PCF directional shadow filtering are validated above the backend through private DXIL shader artifacts; hardware comparison samplers, production shadow quality, and Metal depth remain follow-up work. Sampled depth textures are implemented through private typeless resources, D24 DSV views, R24 SRV views, explicit depth_write-to-shader_read transition validation, sampled descriptor writes, D3D12 sampled-depth readback proof, D3D12 depth-aware postprocess readback proof, D3D12 directional shadow receiver readback proof, and D3D12 fixed sampled-depth 3x3 PCF boundary readback proof.

gameCodeGuidance.currentVulkanRuntimeOwners: Vulkan runtime owners now include VulkanRuntimeInstance, VulkanRuntimeDevice, VulkanRuntimeCommandPool, VulkanRuntimeBuffer, VulkanRuntimeTexture, VulkanRuntimeShaderModule, VulkanRuntimeDescriptorSetLayout, VulkanRuntimeDescriptorSet, VulkanRuntimePipelineLayout, VulkanRuntimeGraphicsPipeline, VulkanRuntimeComputePipeline, VulkanRuntimeSwapchain, VulkanRuntimeFrameSync, VulkanRuntimeReadbackBuffer, and VulkanRuntimeSampler. The create_rhi_device bridge exposes backend-neutral BufferHandle, TextureHandle, ShaderHandle, DescriptorSetLayoutHandle, DescriptorSetHandle, PipelineLayoutHandle, GraphicsPipelineHandle, ComputePipelineHandle, SwapchainHandle, SwapchainFrameHandle, graphics command lists, immediate FenceValue stats/waits, upload-buffer writes, descriptor updates for uniform/storage buffer, sampled texture, and sampler bindings, standalone texture transitions, buffer copies, buffer-to-texture copies, texture-to-buffer copies, standalone texture render-target clears, optional depth attachment clears, standalone texture render-target draws with optional depth attachments, copy-only submit, command-list-local texture state tracking, stale texture-state submit rejection, submit-success-only texture-state commits, and transient lease creation while keeping VkBuffer, VkImage, VkDeviceMemory, VkShaderModule, VkDescriptorSetLayout, VkDescriptorPool, VkDescriptorSet, VkWriteDescriptorSet, VkDescriptorBufferInfo, VkDescriptorImageInfo, VkSampler, VkBufferCopy, VkBufferImageCopy, VkPipelineLayout, VkPipeline, VkSurfaceKHR, VkSwapchainKHR, VkImageView, VkSemaphore, VkFence, and native commands private. Descriptor creation, update, and binding use create_runtime_descriptor_set_layout, create_runtime_descriptor_set, update_runtime_descriptor_set, descriptor-aware create_runtime_pipeline_layout, and record_runtime_descriptor_set_binding while VkDescriptorSetLayout, VkDescriptorPool, VkDescriptorSet, VkWriteDescriptorSet, VkDescriptorBufferInfo, vkUpdateDescriptorSets, vkCmdBindDescriptorSets, and Vulkan function pointers remain private to MK_rhi_vulkan. Pipeline creation uses create_runtime_pipeline_layout, create_runtime_graphics_pipeline, and create_runtime_compute_pipeline with dynamic rendering metadata, native DepthStencilStateDesc mapping, and compute shader modules while VkPipelineLayout, VkPipeline, VkPipelineVertexInputStateCreateInfo, VkGraphicsPipelineCreateInfo, VkComputePipelineCreateInfo, vertex input descriptions, and Vulkan function pointers remain private to MK_rhi_vulkan. Swapchain creation uses create_runtime_swapchain while VkSurfaceKHR, VkSwapchainKHR, VkImage, VkImageView, and image-view destruction order remain private to MK_rhi_vulkan. Frame sync, acquire, and present use create_runtime_frame_sync, acquire_next_runtime_swapchain_image, and present_runtime_swapchain_image while VkSemaphore, VkFence, VkPresentInfoKHR, vkAcquireNextImageKHR/vkQueuePresentKHR results, and acquired/presented image indices remain private or first-party mapped; the IRhiDevice bridge records shader-free swapchain clear render passes, queues present, submits through private synchronization2, and completes frame ownership on submit. Dynamic rendering color/depth clear and draw recording use record_runtime_dynamic_rendering_clear, record_runtime_dynamic_rendering_draw, record_runtime_texture_rendering_clear, and record_runtime_texture_rendering_draw while VkRenderingInfo, VkRenderingAttachmentInfo including pDepthAttachment, VkCommandBuffer, VkPipeline, VkImageView, viewport/scissor state, vertex/index buffers, and vkCmdBeginRendering/vkCmdBindPipeline/vkCmdBindVertexBuffers/vkCmdBindIndexBuffer/vkCmdDraw/vkCmdDrawIndexed/vkCmdEndRendering function pointers remain private. Standalone texture transition/copy recording uses build_texture_transition_barrier, record_runtime_texture_barrier, record_runtime_buffer_copy, record_runtime_buffer_texture_copy, and record_runtime_texture_buffer_copy while shader-read hazards, depth_write hazards, D24S8 depth|stencil image-barrier aspects, usage/format/state compatibility checks, VkImageMemoryBarrier2, VkDependencyInfo, VkBufferCopy, VkBufferImageCopy, vkCmdCopyBuffer, vkCmdCopyBufferToImage, vkCmdCopyImageToBuffer, and image layouts remain private or first-party mapped. Synchronization2 recording uses record_runtime_swapchain_frame_barrier and submit_runtime_command_buffer while VkDependencyInfo, VkImageMemoryBarrier2, VkSubmitInfo2, VkSemaphoreSubmitInfo, VkCommandBufferSubmitInfo, queue handles, semaphores, fences, and raw VkResult values remain private or first-party mapped; requested queue-idle waits must succeed before submit_runtime_command_buffer reports submitted, and logical device creation requires the synchronization2 feature before those commands are requested. Upload and readback use write_runtime_buffer, read_runtime_buffer, create_runtime_readback_buffer, record_runtime_swapchain_image_readback, and read_runtime_readback_buffer while VkBuffer, VkDeviceMemory, VkMemoryRequirements, VkPhysicalDeviceMemoryProperties, VkBufferImageCopy, mapped pointers, and native memory commands remain private or first-party mapped. Environment-gated visible draw/readback, raw texture-sampling, depth-ordered draw/readback, sampled-depth readback, shadow receiver readback, RhiFrameRenderer runtime material texture-sampling, and cooked runtime scene GPU palette proofs now run through IRhiDevice when MK_VULKAN_TEST_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_TEXTURE_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_TEXTURE_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_DEPTH_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_DEPTH_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_DEPTH_SAMPLE_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_DEPTH_SAMPLE_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_POSTPROCESS_DEPTH_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_POSTPROCESS_DEPTH_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_SHADOW_RECEIVER_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_SHADOW_RECEIVER_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_RUNTIME_MATERIAL_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_RUNTIME_MATERIAL_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_COMPUTE_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_COMPUTE_MORPH_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_COMPUTE_MORPH_RENDER_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_COMPUTE_MORPH_RENDER_FRAGMENT_SPV, MK_VULKAN_TEST_COMPUTE_MORPH_TANGENT_FRAME_SPV, or MK_VULKAN_TEST_RUNTIME_SCENE_VERTEX_SPV/MK_VULKAN_TEST_RUNTIME_SCENE_FRAGMENT_SPV point at real SPIR-V artifacts and the local Vulkan runtime is available; default generated-game availability remains gated by runtime and shader-toolchain readiness.
gameCodeGuidance.currentMetal: SDK-independent MK_rhi_metal scaffold exposes backend identity, host support, capability profile, probe plan, deterministic probe result helpers, non-empty metallib shader library artifact validation, runtime/default-device/command-queue/shader-library readiness planning, texture synchronization planning for render/blit/present encoder intent, platform availability diagnostics, and Apple-only native default-device, command-queue, command-buffer, render-encoder, texture-target, CAMetalLayer drawable acquisition, drawable render-encoder creation, drawable present scheduling, command-buffer submission, and texture-readback ownership through retained private PIMPL objects without including Metal or QuartzCore headers or exposing native handles. Apple Objective-C++ paths assign GameEngine.RHI.Metal.* GPU debugger labels through -[MTLObject setLabel:] on the default MTLDevice, MTLCommandQueue, per-allocation MTLCommandBuffer, offscreen and drawable-backed MTLTexture targets, MTLRenderCommandEncoder, and transient readback MTLCommandBuffer/MTLBlitCommandEncoder/MTLBuffer objects.
gameCodeGuidance.currentInput: VirtualInput for keyboard-style state, VirtualPointerInput with PointerSample/PointerState for mouse, touch, and pen-style pointer state, VirtualGamepadInput with GamepadButton/GamepadAxis state for gamepad buttons and axes, mobile touch sample mapping into first-party PointerSample values without native handles, VirtualPointerInput::touch_gesture for active touch count, centroid, centroid delta, and two-touch pinch scale primitives, TouchGestureRecognizer for tap, double-tap, long-press, pan, swipe, pinch, rotate, and canceled gesture events, and MK_runtime RuntimeInputActionMap plus RuntimeInputStateView and RuntimeInputContextStack for deterministic GameEngine.RuntimeInputActions.v4 keyboard, pointer, gamepad button, scalar key-pair, and scalar gamepad-axis action documents evaluated over first-party virtual input state through bind_key, bind_pointer, bind_gamepad_button, bind_key_axis, bind_gamepad_axis, bind_key_in_context, bind_pointer_in_context, bind_gamepad_button_in_context, bind_key_axis_in_context, bind_gamepad_axis_in_context, context-aware action_down, and context-aware axis_value. Use RuntimeInputRebindingCaptureRequest, RuntimeInputRebindingCaptureResult, and capture_runtime_input_rebinding_action to turn the next allowed first-party key, pointer, or gamepad-button press into a validated RuntimeInputRebindingProfile action override candidate. Use RuntimeInputRebindingAxisCaptureRequest, RuntimeInputRebindingAxisCaptureResult, and capture_runtime_input_rebinding_axis to capture the first deterministic gamepad axis magnitude past a deadzone into a validated axis override candidate. Use RuntimeInputRebindingFocusCaptureRequest, RuntimeInputRebindingFocusCaptureResult, and capture_runtime_input_rebinding_action_with_focus when a host-owned menu has armed one capture row and needs deterministic focus_retained plus gameplay_input_consumed output for waiting, captured, or pressed-but-rejected candidates. Use RuntimeInputRebindingPresentationModel rows from make_runtime_input_rebinding_presentation when a runtime/game menu needs reviewed base/profile action and axis display labels plus symbolic glyph lookup keys. Empty context stacks use default; non-empty stacks select the first context that declares the requested action. Scalar action axes apply deterministic clamp/deadzone handling; broad UI focus integration, global input consumption/bubbling beyond focused rebinding capture, radial stick deadzones, response curves, pointer delta axes, gesture-to-RuntimeInputActions binding, full runtime/game rebinding panels outside the reviewed editor action capture lane, real platform input glyph generation/assets/rendering, keyboard-layout localization, keyboard key-pair axis capture, multiplayer device assignment, per-device profiles, SDL3, and native device handles remain follow-up adapter work.
gameCodeGuidance.currentInputRebindingProfiles: MK_runtime RuntimeInputRebindingProfile and GameEngine.RuntimeInputRebindingProfile.v1 provide deterministic persisted full-row action and axis overlays over a caller-supplied base RuntimeInputActionMap. Use validate_runtime_input_rebinding_profile, apply_runtime_input_rebinding_profile, serialize_runtime_input_rebinding_profile, deserialize_runtime_input_rebinding_profile, load_runtime_input_rebinding_profile, and write_runtime_input_rebinding_profile through IFileSystem/RootedFileSystem. Use RuntimeInputRebindingCaptureRequest, RuntimeInputRebindingCaptureResult, and capture_runtime_input_rebinding_action for host-independent digital action trigger capture from first-party keyboard, pointer, and gamepad-button state into a validated action override candidate. Use RuntimeInputRebindingAxisCaptureRequest, RuntimeInputRebindingAxisCaptureResult, and capture_runtime_input_rebinding_axis for host-independent gamepad-axis and two-held-keyboard key-pair axis capture (capture_keyboard_key_pair_axes) from first-party VirtualGamepadInput axis magnitudes and VirtualInput key-down pairs into a validated axis override candidate. Use RuntimeInputRebindingFocusCaptureRequest, RuntimeInputRebindingFocusCaptureResult, and capture_runtime_input_rebinding_action_with_focus for an armed/focused/modal capture guard that reports focus_retained while waiting and gameplay_input_consumed for waiting, captured, or pressed-but-rejected digital candidates after the guard passes. Use RuntimeInputRebindingPresentationToken, RuntimeInputRebindingPresentationRow, RuntimeInputRebindingPresentationModel, present_runtime_input_action_trigger, present_runtime_input_axis_source, and make_runtime_input_rebinding_presentation for host-independent display rows with deterministic labels and symbolic glyph lookup keys after loading, validating, or applying a profile. Visible full interactive runtime/game rebinding panels outside the reviewed editor action capture lane, broad UI focus integration, global input consumption/bubbling beyond focused rebinding capture, radial stick deadzones, response curves, pointer delta axes, gesture-to-RuntimeInputActions binding, real platform input glyph generation/assets/rendering, keyboard-layout localization, keyboard key-pair axis capture, multiplayer device assignment, per-device profiles, SDL3 input APIs, editor-private runtime APIs, native device handles, and cloud/binary saves remain follow-up adapter work.
gameCodeGuidance.currentProcessExecution: ProcessCommand, RecordingProcessRunner, run_process_command, RootedFileSystem, and Windows Win32ProcessRunner for shell-free executable-plus-arguments process execution with stdout/stderr capture and rooted project file access
gameCodeGuidance.currentToolExecution: ShaderToolProcessRunner and ShaderToolExecutionPolicy bridge shader compile commands to platform process execution with artifact output-root policy and reviewed executable override for PATH names, project-relative tool paths, or absolute installed SDK/tool paths; ShaderArtifactValidationProcessRunner bridges spirv-val validation commands to the same shell-free process policy; DXC Vulkan SPIR-V command planning uses -spirv and -fspv-target-env=vulkan1.3 through executable-plus-argument vectors; MK_editor_core make_viewport_shader_compile_requests queues default D3D12 DXIL and Vulkan SPIR-V viewport shader artifacts from one HLSL source, while make_material_preview_shader_compile_requests queues factor-only and base-color-textured material preview D3D12 DXIL/Vulkan SPIR-V artifacts from a material-preview HLSL source; discover_shader_tools finds deterministic dxc, spirv-val, metal, and metallib descriptors and tracks dxc.spirv-codegen capability markers for deterministic toolchain roots; evaluate_shader_toolchain_readiness reports D3D12 DXIL, Vulkan SPIR-V, DXC SPIR-V CodeGen, and Metal library readiness;
